title: wallet: generate_wallet/restore_wallet return plain [u8;64] seed
description: generate_wallet() and restore_wallet() both return seed: [u8;64] as a plain array. This is the 64-byte BIP-39 PBKDF2 output from which all spending keys are derived. The caller in cli/src/commands.rs binds it as a plain local variable; if an error occurs mid-function the seed is never zeroized. Callers must encrypt before drop but nothing in the type enforces this. Return type should be Zeroizing<[u8; 64]> to guarantee zeroization regardless of error path.
